subcodes.first_line: O Divine Herald! Letter number 40 was received. Moreover, concerning the non-receipt of replies from the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت بشیرالهی نامه نمروی ۴۰ وصول یافت ضمنا از عدم ارسال جواب احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters
